narrative:
South Range Local Sd school district has 5,064 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.3%, a modest Republican lean of 5.7 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -10.7% D−R vs -3.6% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
